violations.text: Establishment is lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024

At the time of inspection, faucet located at the 3 bay sink bar was not able to reach all three sinks. PIC informed that faucet needs to reach all three sinks to effectively wash, rinse and sanitize. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024
